positive: Minimalist geometric line art pattern featuring abstract mountain ranges and crescent moons. Clean Scandinavian aesthetic, continuous line drawing, limited palette of terracotta, sage green, and charcoal. Vector illustration, negative space design, perfect for embroidery or engraving.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, photorealism, messy, gradient fill
